faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Eastchester?
faqs.answer: Eastchester homeowners typically encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and acrobat ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage the wooden structures common in Eastchester's older homes. Our technicians identify the specific species and customize treatment accordingly.
